name: Navigate by Pdf Search Results Lyrasis
fullName: Read PDF in LYRARIS Reads on IOS: Navigate by Pdf Search Results Lyrasis
statusMessage: 'The Disappearing Fruit :' book with specific action button is not present on catalog books screen
statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: 'The Disappearing Fruit :' book with specific action button is not present on catalog books screen
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.CatalogBooksSteps.isBookPresent(CatalogBooksSteps.java:83)
	at ✽.EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on catalog books screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/PdfLyrasisIos.feature:97)

testStage.statusMessage: 'The Disappearing Fruit :' book with specific action button is not present on catalog books screen
testStage.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: 'The Disappearing Fruit :' book with specific action button is not present on catalog books screen
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.CatalogBooksSteps.isBookPresent(CatalogBooksSteps.java:83)
	at ✽.EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on catalog books screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/PdfLyrasisIos.feature:97)

steps.name: Given  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
Then  Account 'LYRASIS Reads' is present on Accounts screen
When  I enter credentials for 'LYRASIS Reads' account
And  I search 'available' book of distributor 'Biblioboard' and bookType 'EBOOK' from "LYRASIS Reads" and save as 'bookNameInfo'
And  I switch to 'eBooks' catalog tab
And  Click GET action button on EBOOK book with 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
Then  EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on catalog books screen
steps.statusMessage: 'The Disappearing Fruit :' book with specific action button is not present on catalog books screen
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: 'The Disappearing Fruit :' book with specific action button is not present on catalog books screen
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.CatalogBooksSteps.isBookPresent(CatalogBooksSteps.java:83)
	at ✽.EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on catalog books screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/PdfLyrasisIos.feature:97)

steps.name: When  Open EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Click READ action button on book details screen
Then  Reader pdf screen is opened
When  I open search pdf screen
And  I enter 'try' text on search pdf screen
And  I open random found text and save page number as 'pageNumber' on search pdf screen
Then  Page number is equal to 'pageNumber' on pdf reader screen
